lastReleaseMessage: dashboard: writer emits standardized items-left and backlog item lists

barRaise.topFinding: Carry-forward pass (day 1 since the 2026-06-28 full review): zero commits since, working tree clean, no open BLOCK, work queue depth 0, so the lens scores and health are carried unchanged. M6 is closed and the project is anchored at 100 percent complete. The last full pass confirmed v0.14.0 (savings goals + CSV bank-format auto-detect) shipped without breaching a locked decision: the new /api/goals POST/PATCH boundaries run every money input through guardCents (D-003 holds), and detectFormat ships with a dedicated test. The .finances remote-history exposure stays retired (pre-rewrite SHAs return 422, .finances 404s). No HIGH findings, no open BLOCK, steady-state maintenance. Verdict working at health 92.

deferred.title: Migrate the SQLCipher key off the archived keytar dependency.
deferred.reason: DECIDED keep 2026-06-25; gated on the build-failure trigger (act only if keytar fails to load/build on a supported Node LTS). Key is escrowed and injectable via YAB_DB_KEY without keytar.

deferred.title: Flip the Plaid connector from Sandbox to paid Production.
deferred.reason: Gated on external paid Plaid Production approval (D-012); kept a deliberate, documented budget decision.
